news.title: Henrique Sá Pessoa e Jesús Camacho celebram a gastronomia de Tenerife em Lisboa - Rua de Baixo
news.summary:
# Summary

This special culinary collaboration brings Canary Islands cuisine to Portugal's capital, offering visitors and locals a chance to experience authentic Tenerife flavors and cooking techniques in a Lisbon setting.

news.summary:
# Summary

Lisbon is celebrating Mother's Day with a special "Chic-Nic Musical" event that combines picnics, live concerts, and fine dining experiences throughout the city. Visitors looking for a unique way to celebrate Mother's Day or enjoy a special outing will find curated food and music experiences that blend casual outdoor dining with upscale gastronomy. This makes it an ideal opportunity for tourists and locals to experience Lisbon's culinary scene in a festive, entertainment-filled setting.
